name: Broccomole (Vegan)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, blend the cooked broccoli stems with lemon juice, cumin, and garlic powder until completely smooth.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (tomato, scallion, and green chili pepper) to the mixture and mix well by hand.
3. Chill before serving for best flavor.
(Note: This recipe is from The New McDougall Cookbook.)
